description: Persistent zero-knowledge memory for AI agents. AES-256-GCM encryption, PII redaction.
name: io.github.SynapseLayer/synapse-layer

environmentVariables.description: Identifier for the agent using the memory layer.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Differential privacy epsilon parameter. Lower = stronger privacy. Range: 0.1–2.0.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_PRIVACY_EPSILON

environmentVariables.description: AES-256-GCM encryption key for at-rest memory encryption. Auto-generated if not provided.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_ENCRYPTION_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Synapse Layer — Continuous Consciousness Infrastructure
